testsuite.name: com.billing.charge.calculation.internal.step.ChargeItemStepResultTypePropertyTest

timestamp = 2026-02-27T18:12:12.137526, ChargeItemStepResultTypePropertyTest:monthlyFeeStepShouldOnlyProducePeriodResults = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 64 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 17 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 5910126054009885419 | random seed to reproduce generated values
timestamp = 2026-02-27T18:12:12.190832, ChargeItemStepResultTypePropertyTest:usageFeeStepShouldOnlyProduceFlatResults = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 64 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 15 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = -8547817839474337499 | random seed to reproduce generated values
timestamp = 2026-02-27T18:12:12.214689, ChargeItemStepResultTypePropertyTest:oneTimeFeeStepShouldOnlyProduceFlatResults = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 16 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 13 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = -7222220560845569225 | random seed to reproduce generated values
